title: System Configuration
subtitle: Manage global preferences, appearance, and data integrity
visual_identity_desc: Choose how Teebot looks on your display
cloud_update_desc: Full multilingual support is being rolled out. Some specialized modules may remain in English during the transition phase.
data_integrity_desc: Ensure your business records are safe and recoverable
backup_desc: Protect your catalog, customer directory, and financial records by creating regular offline security copies. These can be used to restore your data in case of hardware failure.
encryption_desc: Secure your local and cloud backups
encryption_active_desc: All new backups are encrypted with AES-256-GCM.
encryption_warning: Your backups are currently unencrypted. Anyone with access to the file can read your financial data.
